protocol.review_gate: ALL code changes (Grok or Claude) require peer APPROVE before merge; re-review required after any fix
protocol.on_peer_approve: merge ff to main, push origin/main, fleet ydoc short ACK
protocol.on_peer_changes: fix, push branch, fleet re-ping for re-review (no merge until new APPROVE)
protocol.on_claude_ships: Grok must review Claude branches; do not merge without Grok APPROVE
